tasks.subject: Task 0: ruleKits.js — add desc + comedy/action/scifi kits (6 -> 9)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Catalog gains a desc per kit + 3 new genre kits; listKits returns {id,label,icon,desc}.

**Files:**
- Modify: server/ruleKits.js
- Modify (test): server/ruleKits.test.js, server/my-stats-enrichment.test.js

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- RULE_KITS has 9 entries incl comedy_night/blockbuster/scifi_night (comedy/action/scifi, classic, no toggles)
- every kit has non-empty desc
- listKits returns {id,label,icon,desc}
- ruleKits.test + my-stats-enrichment.test updated for 9 + new shape; full suite green

**Verify:** npx jest server/ruleKits.test.js server/my-stats-enrichment.test.js --verbose && npm test --silent

**Steps:** TDD per plan T0. Full code in plan.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/ruleKits.js", "server/ruleKits.test.js", "server/my-stats-enrichment.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest server/ruleKits.test.js server/my-stats-enrichment.test.js --verbose && npm test --silent", "acceptanceCriteria": ["RULE_KITS has 9 entries incl comedy_night/blockbuster/scifi_night (comedy/action/scifi, classic, no toggles)", "every kit has non-empty desc", "listKits returns {id,label,icon,desc}", "ruleKits.test + my-stats-enrichment.test updated for 9 + new shape; full suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Remove the lobby theme picker (keep themesSystem mechanic)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Delete the standalone theme dropdown + all wiring serving only it; keep themesSystem mechanic + Hardcore/TV controls.

**Files:**
- Modify: public/index.html (remove 2 theme rows ~335-343, ~441-449), public/js/app.js (drop theme-select from initLobbySettingsHandlers ~64-69), public/js/socketClient.js (remove themesList handler ~210-232), public/js/ui/ui-render.js (remove 2 null-guarded #theme-select(-team) blocks ~287-309, ~478-502), server/socketHandlers.js (remove themesList emit ~143-152 + setTheme handler ~223-228), server/systems/lobbySystem.js (remove setTheme ~283-300 + export ~962)
- Modify (test): client-tests/socket-handlers.test.js (remove #theme-select-team test ~330-342)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- no #theme-select/#theme-select-team in index.html; no theme change-handler in app.js; no themesList handler in socketClient; no #theme-select blocks in ui-render
- no themesList emit + no setTheme handler in socketHandlers; no setTheme in lobbySystem/export
- themesSystem.js byte-identical; hardcore/tv controls + handlers intact
- socket-handlers.test theme test removed, siblings pass; full suite green

**Verify:** npx jest client-tests/socket-handlers.test.js --verbose && npm test --silent

**Steps:** Delete the 1 theme test, then the 9 removal sites (exact blocks in plan T1), verify no live refs + themesSystem.js unchanged, full suite, commit. setTheme sole caller was the removed handler. Full code in plan T1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/index.html", "public/js/app.js", "public/js/socketClient.js", "public/js/ui/ui-render.js", "server/socketHandlers.js", "server/systems/lobbySystem.js", "client-tests/socket-handlers.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest client-tests/socket-handlers.test.js --verbose && npm test --silent", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no #theme-select/#theme-select-team in index.html; no theme change-handler in app.js; no themesList handler in socketClient; no #theme-select blocks in ui-render", "no themesList emit + no setTheme handler in socketHandlers; no setTheme in lobbySystem/export", "themesSystem.js byte-identical; hardcore/tv controls intact", "socket-handlers.test theme test removed, siblings pass; full suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Kit card UI — self-documenting cards + contrast fix + dead-CSS tombstone
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Render each kit as a card (icon + bold label + muted desc), set title/aria, fix dark-text contrast, tombstone dead #theme-select CSS.

**Files:**
- Modify: public/js/ui/rule-kits.js (renderRuleKitChips: desc sub-line in .rule-kit-chip-text + title/aria), client-tests/rule-kit-chips.test.js (KITS desc fixture + desc/title test), public/css/02-hero-lobby.css (replace 6c .rule-kit-chip* rules with card: explicit light color + .rule-kit-chip-text/.rule-kit-chip-desc; keep .rule-kit-section/.rule-kit-chips/.seat-title), public/css/06-states-anim.css (remove #theme-select option ~533-543 -> tombstone)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- renderRuleKitChips renders .rule-kit-chip-name + .rule-kit-chip-desc in .rule-kit-chip-text; sets title + aria-label; null-container + click unchanged
- .rule-kit-chip has explicit light color; two-line card
- 06-states-anim #theme-select option removed (tombstone), no other rule changed
- rule-kit-chips.test asserts desc + title; existing pass; full suite green

**Verify:** npx jest client-tests/rule-kit-chips.test.js --verbose && npm test --silent

**Steps:** TDD per plan T2. blockedBy T0 (desc data) + T1 (element removed before tombstone). Full code in plan T2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/js/ui/rule-kits.js", "client-tests/rule-kit-chips.test.js", "public/css/02-hero-lobby.css", "public/css/06-states-anim.css"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest client-tests/rule-kit-chips.test.js --verbose && npm test --silent", "acceptanceCriteria": ["renderRuleKitChips renders .rule-kit-chip-name + .rule-kit-chip-desc in .rule-kit-chip-text; sets title + aria-label; null-container + click unchanged", ".rule-kit-chip has explicit light color; two-line card", "06-states-anim #theme-select option removed (tombstone), no other rule changed", "rule-kit-chips.test asserts desc + title; existing pass; full suite green"]}
```
